generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyBasedLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling adaptive lighting systems based on occupancy data, integrated with BIM model via tenant ID and endpoint configurations for real-time bidirectional control signals through Eclipse Ditto."
]

instance HVACZoneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator managing HVAC zones with dynamic adjustment capabilities, configured via BIM metadata annotations for device IDs and control logic endpoints in Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingPolicyExecutor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Component executing reinforcement learning-based lighting control policies (BOREALIS) with real-time adjustments to energy consumption patterns based on sensor telemetry."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure capturing real-time occupancy data, annotated in BIM model with metadata for automated extraction and integration via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Multi-parameter sensor measuring temperature, humidity, and air quality, integrated with BIM via standardized metadata annotations for secure data ingestion through Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart meter tracking real-time energy consumption metrics (electricity, water) with bidirectional communication endpoints defined in BIM for validation against DT runtime state."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "User feedback sensor collecting occupancy satisfaction data for adaptive control policy refinement, integrated with BIM via tenant-specific metadata configurations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData FeedbackDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data Transmitted
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalConditionSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance FeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancyFeedbackSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric and functional representation of building infrastructure including spatial relationships, component properties, and BIM metadata annotations for sensor/actuator integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToRuntimeTransformer
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsLayer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extension layer augmenting BIM with runtime semantics including device metadata (sensor IDs, control logic), middleware configurations (Hono/Ditto endpoints), and tenant-specific configurations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoDeviceManager
]

instance SimulationControlPoliciesModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation artifacts including reinforcement learning-based control policies (BOREALIS) and adaptive system configurations generated from BIM data for Unreal Engine runtime."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualizer
]

instance OperationalTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor telemetry including temperature, occupancy, energy consumption, and feedback data normalized via Eclipse Hono and stored in Ditto's device management system."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted, FeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance CustomAnalyticsDataset : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extensible dataset for AI-driven analytics including historical patterns, predictive maintenance indicators, and occupancy-based control optimization metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData FeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMToRuntimeTransformer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tool automating BIM-to-DT transformations including model-to-model and model-to-text techniques for generating runtime artifacts (Ditto configurations, Unreal scripts)."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationAndOptimizationService
]

instance EclipseHonoIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Secure, scalable IoT data ingestion framework providing standardized device management and bidirectional communication via MQTT/HTTP protocols for real-time synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataValidationService
]

instance DittoDeviceManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Device management system enabling bidirectional communication between DT and physical systems with normalized telemetry storage and tenant-specific endpoint configurations."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveControlService, CustomServiceIntegration
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform providing real-time monitoring dashboards and interactive control interfaces for facility managers and engineers."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, StakeholderCollaborationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AI framework implementing BOREALIS adaptive control policies for energy optimization through continuous learning from post-occupancy feedback data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ODTEValidator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Metric evaluation system assessing Overall Digital Twin Entanglement fidelity between physical and virtual systems through automated validation checks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization of building performance metrics including energy consumption, occupancy, and environmental conditions via Unreal Engine 5 dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, OccupancyVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing control policies using sensor data (post-occupancy feedback) to implement energy-efficient strategies like BOREALIS adaptive lighting."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionForecastInsight
]

instance SimulationAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation framework enabling life-cycle analysis and performance forecasting through BIM-to-DT runtime artifact generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceForecastingInsight, CostModelingInsight
]

instance InteractiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Facility management interface allowing real-time adjustments to building systems (lighting, HVAC) with immediate reflection in physical systems via Ditto endpoints."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACAdjustmentAction, LightingControlAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular extension framework enabling DT engineers to develop plug-and-play services like AI-driven analytics or predictive maintenance through standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance DataValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated validation pipeline assessing synchronization fidelity between physical and virtual systems using ODTE metrics and runtime semantics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationFidelityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions

]

]

]

]

    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

]

]

]

instance StakeholderCollaborationService : DTDFVocab:Service [

]

// C12: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [

]

]

]

instance BIMModelingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [

// Added missing PredictiveMaintenanceService instance
instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive maintenance analytics based on sensor data and historical patterns to identify potential equipment failures."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is enabled through **runtime control logic** generated from the BIM model, which defines **actuation commands** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) sent back to the physical system. The framework uses **Eclipse Ditto** to manage device telemetry and **Unreal Engine 5** for **interactive visualization**, where facility managers can issue commands via the DT interface. These commands are translated into **standardized control signals** (e.g., MQTT protocols) and executed by the building’s BCS. The system supports **user-centered control strategies** (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) and **reinforcement learning-based optimization** (as in **BOREALIS**), ensuring dynamic adjustments to the physical infrastructure."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and event-driven**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** for critical operational data (e.g., sensor readings, control signals). The framework supports:
   - **Continuous synchronization** for **low-latency interactions** (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC responses).
   - **Periodic updates** for **longer-term analytics** (e.g., energy consumption trends over hours/days).
   - **Event-based triggers** (e.g., occupancy detection, alarm notifications) for **immediate DT responses**.
   The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the **fidelity of synchronization** between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: Central repository for **static and runtime semantics**, serving as the **semantic foundation**.
   - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** handles **data ingestion, device telemetry, and control signal routing**.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides **interactive 3D interfaces** for facility managers.
   - **Service Layer**: **Modular plugins** (e.g., analytics, optimization) extend DT functionality via **standardized APIs**.
   - **Control Logic Layer**: **Reinforcement learning policies** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) and **user-defined strategies** are embedded in the DT for **dynamic adaptation**.
   The constellation supports **bidirectional data flows** (PT → DT → PT) and **horizontal integration** with external systems (e.g., facility management platforms)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **three primary life-cycle stages**:
   1. **Design Phase**: BIM models are enriched with **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) to prepare for deployment.
   2. **Construction Phase**: The DT is **provisioned and validated** using **model-driven automation**, with **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** configured for real-time data exchange.
   3. **Operation Phase**: The DT enables **continuous monitoring, optimization, and control** of the building’s infrastructure, with **reinforcement learning** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) refining control policies over time.
   The DT represents the **as-operated state** of the physical twin, with **post-occupancy data** used to **adapt and evolve** the virtual representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: Quantifies **synchronization accuracy** between PT and DT by comparing **real-time sensor data** with **virtual representations**.
   - **Model Validation**: **Automated checks** (e.g., semantic consistency, data normalization) during the **BIM-to-DT transformation**.
   - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Post-occupancy data** (e.g., sensor drift, environmental noise) is used to **adjust control policies** dynamically.
   - **Verification Protocols**: **Reinforcement learning validation** (e.g., **BOREALIS**) ensures **predictive accuracy** of optimization models.
   The framework addresses **semantic drift** by **closing feedback loops** between PT and DT via **real-time data synchronization**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for **secure IoT data ingestion** and **Eclipse Ditto** for **device management and telemetry**, using:
   - **MQTT/HTTP Protocols**: For **low-latency bidirectional communication** between PT and DT.
   - **Tenant/Device IDs**: Standardized **metadata identifiers** (e.g., tenant ID, device ID) extracted from BIM models.
   - **Endpoint Addresses**: **Middleware-specific endpoints** (e.g., Hono/Ditto gateways) for **real-time data routing**.
   The connection architecture supports **scalability** (e.g., campus-wide deployments) and **interoperability** with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **cloud-native, modular architecture** with:
   - **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**: Deployed as **containerized microservices** for **scalable IoT data processing**.
   - **Unreal Engine 5**: Runs on **high-performance rendering servers** for **interactive 3D visualization**.
   - **Custom Service Plugins**: Hosted in a **sandboxed environment** to ensure **isolation and security**.
   Deployment follows a **model-driven automation pipeline**, reducing manual intervention. The framework supports **on-premise or cloud-based hosting**, with **low-latency requirements** for real-time applications (e.g., lighting control)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports horizontal integration with:
   - **External Facility Management Systems**: **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful endpoints) for **data exchange** with third-party platforms.
   - **IoT Platforms**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto compatibility** ensures **seamless connectivity** with **industrial IoT ecosystems**.
   - **BIM Collaboration Tools**: **Interoperability** with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for **cross-domain data sharing**.
   - **Custom Service Ecosystems**: **Modular plugins** allow integration with **AI/ML tools**, **predictive analytics**, or **blockchain-based audit logs** for **transparency**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are managed as follows:
   - **PT Owner Retains Control**: The **physical twin’s owner** retains **primary ownership** of operational data (e.g., sensor readings).
   - **DT Service Provider Access**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** acts as a **neutral middleware**, ensuring **secure data routing** without altering ownership.
   - **Privacy Measures**: **Encrypted communication** (e.g., TLS) and **role-based access control** (e.g., tenant-specific permissions) protect sensitive data.
   - **Compliance**: Adherence to **AECO-specific regulations** (e.g., GDPR for personal data) and **industrial standards** (e.g., ISO/IEC 42010 for cybersecurity)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
   - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie)** for **semantic interoperability**.
   - **IoT Protocols**: **MQTT v3.1.1** and **HTTP/REST** for **real-time data exchange**.
   - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Ditto** (OASIS IoT standard) and **Eclipse Hono** (OMA LWM2M-compliant) for **device management**.
   - **Model-Driven Engineering**: **MOF/MDA** (Meta Object Facility/Model-Driven Architecture) for **automated transformations**.
   - **Visualization**: **Unreal Engine 5** with **OpenGL/Vulkan** for **cross-platform compatibility**.
   The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with **existing AECO tools** and **future extensibility** via **standardized extension points**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
   - **Encrypted Communication**: **TLS 1.3** for **secure data transmission** between PT and DT.
   - **Authentication**: **OAuth 2.0/JWT** for **role-based access control** in the DT interface.
   - **Isolation**: **Containerized microservices** (e.g., Hono/Ditto) prevent **cross-service vulnerabilities**.
   - **Safety Protocols**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** in control logic (e.g., **emergency shutdowns** for HVAC systems) to prevent **human accidents**.
   - **Cybersecurity Audits**: **Regular validation** of **middleware configurations** (e.g., Ditto device permissions) to mitigate **remote exploitation risks**.
   The framework follows **ISO/IEC 42010** for **cyber-physical system safety** and **NIST SP 800-53** for **data protection standards**."
]
